## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Refactor / readability
- [ ] Public API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Formal / replay / contracts
- [ ] Runtime / adapters
- [ ] Release / publication

## Invariant Impact

- [ ] No protocol invariant changes
- [ ] Invariant coverage updated
- [ ] Replay or scenario evidence updated
- [ ] Formal receipts updated or not applicable

## AI Assistance

- [ ] No AI assistance used
- [ ] AI assistance used and reviewed by a human

If material AI assistance was used, disclose briefly:

```text
Assisted-by: ...
```

## Checks

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace --all-targets --all-features --locked`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features --locked -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --all-features --locked`
- [ ] release/readiness checks if release-related
